def test_bitcount_127():
    from source import bitcount
    # Test input with multiple 1-bits in binary representation
    n = 127  # binary: 1111111
    expected_count = 7  # 7 one-bits in binary representation of 127
    assert bitcount(n) == expected_count, f"Expected bitcount of {expected_count} for n={n}, but got {bitcount(n)}"

def test_bitcount_128():
    from source import bitcount
    n = 128  # binary: 10000000
    expected_count = 1  # only one 1-bit in binary representation of 128
    assert bitcount(n) == expected_count, f"Expected bitcount of {expected_count} for n={n}, but got {bitcount(n)}"
